channel.title: sarah.lezito TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from sarah.lezito

item.title: At this point…why not ? 🤦🏽‍♀️🤪
item.description: At this point…why not ? 🤦🏽‍♀️🤪
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: One hand. No hands. Still up ? 💪🏻🔥
item.description: One hand. No hands. Still up ? 💪🏻🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Am I painting the snow with my rev limiter ? 🌀❄️🏍️
item.description: Am I painting the snow with my rev limiter ? 🌀❄️🏍️
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: What if my landing spot is a truck bed ? 🏍️🛻
item.description: What if my landing spot is a truck bed ? 🏍️🛻
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: In 2006, a little girl wrote in her diary: “One day I will be the best female stunt rider in the world.” Today, my biggest dreams have come true… and even beyond. Thank you life for making this dream possible. Thank you for turning a childhood dream into
item.description: In 2006, a little girl wrote in her diary: “One day I will be the best female stunt rider in the world.” Today, my biggest dreams have come true… and even beyond. Thank you life for making this dream possible. Thank you for turning a childhood dream into
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Is she okay...or is it over ? 😰🏍️
item.description: Is she okay...or is it over ? 😰🏍️
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Shows, dédicaces et photos...ça va être fou !! 😜❤️ See you Saturday 14 & Sunday March 15 at the Hauts-de-France Motorcycle Show in Douai 🔥 Stunts, autographs and photos...it's going to be wild !
item.description: Shows, dédicaces et photos...ça va être fou !! 😜❤️ See you Saturday 14 & Sunday March 15 at the Hauts-de-France Motorcycle Show in Douai 🔥 Stunts, autographs and photos...it's going to be wild !
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.description: 🔥🔥🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: What happens when a stunt rider gets a police bike ? 🏍️🚨🔥
item.description: What happens when a stunt rider gets a police bike ? 🏍️🚨🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Do I really look like a chill Sunday person ? 🤨🔥
item.description: Do I really look like a chill Sunday person ? 🤨🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Was that luck…or skill ? 🍀💪
item.description: Was that luck…or skill ? 🍀💪
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Shows, dédicaces, photos..... 🏍️🥳 Et toi, tu viens ? 👍 I’ll be at the Hauts-de-France Motorcycle Show in Douai on Saturday March 14th and Sunday March 15th ! Shows, autograph sessions, photos... Are you coming ?
item.description: Shows, dédicaces, photos..... 🏍️🥳 Et toi, tu viens ? 👍 I’ll be at the Hauts-de-France Motorcycle Show in Douai on Saturday March 14th and Sunday March 15th ! Shows, autograph sessions, photos... Are you coming ?
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Le public du @Salon du 2 Roues était incroyable ! 🔥 tu étais là?? The crowd at the Lyon 2 Wheels Show was incredible! 🔥 @Groupe Dafy Moto @kawasaki_france_officiel @HJC Helmets @bowtexgear
item.description: Le public du @Salon du 2 Roues était incroyable ! 🔥 tu étais là?? The crowd at the Lyon 2 Wheels Show was incredible! 🔥 @Groupe Dafy Moto @kawasaki_france_officiel @HJC Helmets @bowtexgear
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Performance stars here…right ? ⛓️🪛⚙️

item.title: Have you ever seen a Stoppie this classy ? 🏍️🤵‍♀️
item.description: Have you ever seen a Stoppie this classy ? 🏍️🤵‍♀️

item.title: Have you ever seen two girls load a bike into a pickup ? 👯‍♀️🏍️🛻

item.description: Do cops really do this ? 👮🤪
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: J'espère vous voir là-bas 🙏 📆RDV samedi 14 et dimanche 15 mars 26 🔥 I’ll be at the Hauts-de-France motorcycle show in Douai this weekend… I hope to see you there! 🏍️ Meeting Saturday 14th and Sunday 15th March 2026 🔥
item.description: J'espère vous voir là-bas 🙏 📆RDV samedi 14 et dimanche 15 mars 26 🔥 I’ll be at the Hauts-de-France motorcycle show in Douai this weekend… I hope to see you there! 🏍️ Meeting Saturday 14th and Sunday 15th March 2026 🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Wait for the end… such a cute moment ❤️

item.title: Did you see that jump ? 🔥🔥

item.title: Blink and you'll miss the bike change ? 😉❤️💜
item.description: Blink and you'll miss the bike change ? 😉❤️💜
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Did I forget where the seat is ? 😜🤭🔥
item.description: Did I forget where the seat is ? 😜🤭🔥
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Je serai là samedi 14 et dimanche 15 mars 26 pour vous rencontrer : shows et dédicaces au programme !!! Who's coming to see me in Douai this weekend ? I'll be there on Saturday and Sunday...
item.description: Je serai là samedi 14 et dimanche 15 mars 26 pour vous rencontrer : shows et dédicaces au programme !!! Who's coming to see me in Douai this weekend ? I'll be there on Saturday and Sunday...
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: 3 jours incroyables au Salon du 2 Roues. Merci à tous d’être venus, votre énergie me donne tellement de force ! 🙏 3 incredible days at the Salon du 2 Roues. Thank you all for coming, your energy gives me so much strength! 🙏 @Groupe Dafy Moto
item.description: 3 jours incroyables au Salon du 2 Roues. Merci à tous d’être venus, votre énergie me donne tellement de force ! 🙏 3 incredible days at the Salon du 2 Roues. Thank you all for coming, your energy gives me so much strength! 🙏 @Groupe Dafy Moto
item.author: sarah.lezito

item.title: Five years later…same stunt ? ⌛️🏍️🔥
item.description: Five years later…same stunt ? ⌛️🏍️🔥
